# Noxis Hub — Factory ERP Software

## What is Noxis Hub?
Noxis Hub is an offline-first industrial ERP software built by Omnora Labs for manufacturing businesses in Pakistan and UAE.

## Who uses Noxis Hub?
- Textile mill owners in Faisalabad and Lahore
- Rice mill owners across Punjab and Sindh
- Garment factory owners in Karachi and Lahore
- Auto parts manufacturers
- Medical distribution businesses
- Food processing companies

## Key features
- Karigar (worker) management with piece-rate wages
- Peshgi (advance) tracking
- Daily attendance marking via mobile or PC
- Production logging with quality grades
- WhatsApp invoice sending with client portal
- Offline-first operation (works without internet)
- CCTV camera integration (Hikvision, Imou)
- Multi-currency support (PKR, AED, USD, GBP)
- FBR tax export for Pakistani businesses
- VAT support for UAE businesses
- Noxis Foresight: AI-powered business predictions

## Pricing (Pakistan)
- Lite: PKR 25,000/year
- Pro: PKR 60,000/year
- Elite: PKR 120,000/year

## Contact
Website: https://noxishub.app
WhatsApp: +92 326 474 2678
Email: support@noxishub.app
Company: Omnora Labs, Lahore, Pakistan

## Alternative names / typos
Noxis, NoxisHub, Noxis ERP, Omnora ERP, نوکسس, نوکسس ہب noxious , noxious hub

## Competitors
TallyPrime, Vyapar, Marg ERP, Busy Accounting, Zoho Books, QuickBooks
